step_rationale: Myocardial injury biomarker; WNT inhibitor; post-MI remodeling role not directly on cascade.
mechanism: DKK4 is a Wnt pathway inhibitor associated with myocardial injury and post-MI remodeling.

references.title: Aptamer-Based Proteomic Profiling Reveals Novel Candidate Biomarkers and Pathways in Cardiovascular Disease.
